spec.title: HTTP traffic by route and status
spec.description: HTTP request rate grouped by route template and response status.

spec.title: ALB request count
spec.description: External HTTP request rate at the load balancer (yu-muyu2-alb).

spec.title: ALB target response time
spec.description: Average response time measured at the load balancer — compare against app-side P50/P95.

spec.title: ALB healthy host count
spec.description: Number of healthy targets registered in the load balancer target group. Drop to 0 means full outage.

spec.title: SQS queue depth
spec.description: Messages visible in yu-muyu2-invoice-pdf-jobs. Growing depth means worker can't keep up.

spec.title: SQS oldest message age
spec.description: Age of the oldest unprocessed message. High values indicate worker stalls or failures.

spec.title: SQS message flow
spec.description: Messages sent, received, and deleted per minute — compare with muyu_invoice_jobs_received_total.

spec.title: RDS CPU & connections
spec.description: Postgres (yu-muyu2-postgres) CPU utilisation and active connection count.

spec.title: RDS read/write latency
spec.description: Postgres average read and write latency. Spikes here correlate with slow invoice persistence.

spec.title: RDS free storage space
spec.description: Remaining free storage on yu-muyu2-postgres. Alert if this trends toward zero.

spec.title: Worker jobs received and finished
spec.description: Worker job intake and terminal outcomes.

spec.title: HTTP latency P50 and P95
spec.description: P50 and P95 duration of completed HTTP requests.

spec.title: Invoice-generation outcomes
spec.description: Invoice-generation outcomes, including validation and persistence/queueing failures.

spec.title: Worker job duration P50/P95 by outcome
spec.description: P50 and P95 worker job duration by terminal outcome.

spec.title: Pipeline-stage duration P50/P95
spec.description: P50 and P95 duration for PDF generation, storage, and email stages.

spec.title: Pipeline-stage errors
spec.description: Pipeline errors in the selected time range.

links.title: Explore logs
links.tooltip: Filter parsed JSON records by error, requestId, invoiceId, or trace_id.

links.title: Explore traces
links.tooltip: Open Tempo Explore and inspect a trace_id from a related log record.
